sections.paragraph:
Original: תּשׁבּי

Transliteration: tishbı̂y

Phonetic: tish-bee'

BDB Definition:

Tishbite = "captivity"
  1. the home of Elijah
    1. site unknown but maybe the town of Tishbe
  2. an inhabitant of Tishbe or Tishbi or Tesheb
    1. site unknown and name uncertain

Origin: patrial from an unused name meaning recourse

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
